name: Gene Perla
abstract: Gene Perla (born March 1, 1940) is an American jazz bassist.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Chase, the Bill Evans Trio, and the Elvin Jones Quintet

works.t: I'm a Fool to Want You

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Chase, the Bill Evans Trio, and the Elvin Jones Quintet

works.t: I'm a Fool to Want You

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Bergonzi
about_quotes.evidence: I’m playing with the Elvin Jones 50th Anniversary of Live at the Lighthouse with Dave Liebman, Gene Perla, Adam Nussbaum.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Bergonzi interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 7, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Cobb
about_quotes.evidence: So I went out there. It was Gene Perla, Jan Hammer, and myself for a while.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Cobb — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: Gene, when he got the gig – when Gene Perla got it, he said, “I’m going to get you and Grossman on it. Watch.” ... Sure enough, man, six months later, I get a call. ... I’m plus with Elvin Jones and his trio
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Don Alias
about_quotes.evidence: First of all the Stone Alliance thing with Gene Perla, we were all, I’m telling you we were all just like close, crazy, wild friends... let’s start a band together... So it was a trio.
about_quotes.doc_title: Don Alias interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 6, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Jamey Aebersold
about_quotes.evidence: I had Gene Perla the bass player, adjust them... Gene Perla, the bass player, did that. He and his friend. And they did it with half a dozen, six, seven, eight of my play-a-longs.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jamey Aebersold interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 26, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Kirchner
about_quotes.evidence: I heard Elvin Jones’ quartet in a little auditorium on the upper west side © Fillius Jazz Archive -8- with Joe Farrell and Dave Liebman and Gene Perla
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Kirchner interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 4, 2021
